[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] '''Phlik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] soldier for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] he was stationed at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] as a recruiter.

{{Char-stub}}
